message:
feat(cli): add build metadata and 'wa version' subcommand

build.rs (new):
- Compile-time build script that captures git hash, dirty flag,
  build timestamp, rustc version, target triple, and enabled features
  as environment variables for main.rs

main.rs:
- Add build_meta module reading compile-time env vars (WA_GIT_HASH,
  WA_BUILD_TS, WA_RUSTC_VERSION, WA_TARGET, WA_FEATURES)
- Provide short_version() (e.g. "0.1.0 (abc123def)") and
  verbose_version() with full metadata block
- Wire build metadata into clap version display via LazyLock
- Add 'wa version [--full]' subcommand for explicit version query
- Reformat several command definitions for rustfmt compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
